arts.ttl: Eintracht Frankfurt vs. Borussia Dortmund preview: Sahin under pressure
arts.sum: Nuri Sahin will be desperate to claim all three points when he takes his Borussia Dortmund side to Deutsche Bank Park for Friday’s Bundesliga clash with Eintracht Frankfurt.

arts.ttl: Roger Schmidt has no interest in coaching Borussia Dortmund
arts.sum: In the event that Borussia Dortmund part ways with Nuri Şahin, then Roger Schmidt has no interest in coaching the Bundesliga side because of reservations about the club’s management, according…

arts.ttl: Source: City, Frankfurt reach deal for Marmoush
arts.sum: Manchester City have reached a verbal agreement with Eintracht Frankfurt for forward Omar Marmoush, a source has told ESPN.

arts.ttl: Man City and Eintracht Frankfurt reach verbal agreement over Omar Marmoush transfer
arts.sum: The two clubs have come to an agreement for the 25-year-old Egyptian forward

arts.ttl: Several reports: Eintracht Frankfurt and Manchester City agree Marmoush deal
arts.sum: A number of reports claim that Eintracht Frankfurt and Manchester City have reached an agreement for Omar Marmoush.

arts.ttl: Omar Marmoush to sign five-year Man City contract after 'verbal agreement' reached with Eintracht Frankfurt
arts.sum: Manchester City reportedly reach a verbal agreement with Eintracht Frankfurt to sign attacker Omar Marmoush, who is set to sign a five-year contract at the Etihad Stadium.

arts.ttl: Man City reach verbal agreement with Eintracht Frankfurt in £67m deal for striker Omar Marmoush - with January spending spree far from done
arts.sum: The Premier League champions had already agreed personal terms with Marmoush and now look to seal his £67million move. Marmoush, 25, is the second-top scorer in the Bundesliga.

arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund push to sign Man Utd forward Rashford
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund are now pushing to sign Manchester United forward Marcus Rashford, according to Sky Germany.

arts.ttl: Milan Eye Gio Reyna: Furlani’s German Trip and the Mendes-USA Factor
arts.sum: AC Milan's pursuit of attacking reinforcements has led them to an intriguing prospect in Giovanni Reyna, the versatile Borussia Dortmund attacker. The recent trip to Düsseldorf by Milan executives Furlani and Moncada suggests a potential move for the American talent, who fits the profile of a multi-faceted offensive player that could bolster Sergio Conceicao's squad. The post Milan Eye Gio Reyna: Furlani’s German Trip and the Mendes-USA Factor appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Chelsea 'in talks' for INTRIGUING transfer for long-term target
arts.sum: Dortmund have approached Chelsea over a transfer for Veiga this month and a loan offer is understood to have been submitted, with any future buyout clauses potentially impacting the likelihood of Adeyemi moving to Stamford Bridge in the summer. Chelsea are still 'in talks' to make a major attacking signing, although a deal may end up occurring in the summer as opposed to this month as Enzo Maresca pushes for his preferred target.
